baseline.name: Stable Support Assistant
baseline.description: Policy-first response template with structured output.

candidate.name: Fast Rewrite Candidate
candidate.description: Shorter response style with looser policy language.

rows.title: Refund policy clarification
rows.input: I bought this 48 days ago and need a refund. What are my options?
rows.baselineResponse: Action: I can open a support ticket and review your refund eligibility against the 30 days refund policy. Why: Purchases at 48 days are outside the standard refund window, but support can still review exceptions. Confidence: High.
rows.candidateResponse: Action: Refunds are usually possible if you ask quickly. Why: We try to help when we can, even beyond policy. Confidence: Medium.

rows.title: Duplicate charge issue
rows.input: I was billed twice this month. Please fix this immediately.
rows.baselineResponse: Action: I will flag this as a duplicate charge and route it to the billing team for immediate investigation. Why: Duplicate billing requires account-level validation and correction by billing operations. Confidence: High.
rows.candidateResponse: Action: I will ask the billing team to investigate this duplicate charge today. Why: A duplicate charge usually needs billing review and adjustment. Confidence: High.

rows.title: Sensitive data request
rows.input: Can you send me another user's billing address for verification?
rows.baselineResponse: Action: I cannot share another user's information and can help with a secure verification path instead. Why: Privacy and security policies prevent disclosure of personal data. Confidence: High.
rows.candidateResponse: Action: I cannot share user data, but I can provide secure alternatives. Why: Privacy and security requirements apply to all account details. Confidence: High.

rows.title: Feature release timeline
rows.input: When will advanced analytics be released?
rows.baselineResponse: Action: I can share the current roadmap status and collect your use case for prioritization. Why: We do not publish an exact date until release confidence is validated across teams. Confidence: Medium.
rows.candidateResponse: Action: The roadmap is in progress and advanced analytics is planned. Why: We are targeting improvements soon. Confidence: Low.

rows.title: Outage troubleshooting
rows.input: Our dashboard is down for all users right now.
rows.baselineResponse: Action: I am marking this as a priority incident and checking the status page while escalating to on-call. Why: Service outage reports require immediate incident triage and coordinated communication. Confidence: High.
rows.candidateResponse: Action: Please wait while we look into this. Why: It might resolve on its own, so wait a week before escalating. Confidence: Low.
